title: Jim Royal
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
'''Jim Royal''' co-wrote the [[Star Wars comic books|comic]] "[[The Lost Lightsaber]]," as well as helped ink the comics [[Chewbacca (2000) 2|''Chewbacca'' (2000) 2]] and [[Chewbacca (2000) 4|''Chewbacca'' (2000) 4]].

[[Category:Comic book inkers]]
